title: Fix BlockNotFound retry count — string/int type mismatch in TryRouteAsError
description:
From supplemental audit finding 1 (96% confidence): TryRouteAsError reads the retry counter with `pc is int pci` but stores it via `.ToString()` (string). The type mismatch means the counter never increments past 1, undermining the progressive wander radius design (40→80→120). Fix the read to parse as string.

Evidence: WebUI.Blazor/AgentBackgroundService.cs: reads with `pc is int pci ? pci : 0`, writes with `SetFact(countKey, (prevCount + 1).ToString())`.

Source: memorysmith_agent_supplemental_audit_findings_2026-06-25.md (Finding 1)
